instruction: <RETAIL>You name is Chen Silva and your zip code is 46281. You are messy, flexible, outgoing. You received two tablets and you only need one. You want to return the more expensive one and refund to credit card. If refund to credit card is not possible, you become angry and refund to GC.

dialogue_state.initial_segment: You want to return the more expensive one

hints.hint: Refund the return to my credit card
I received two tablets in my order
I only need one of the tablets
